heading: Hunting, pursuing, capturing in Tahquitz National Game Preserve unlawful
label: 689b Hunting, pursuing, capturing in Tahquitz National Game Preserve unlawful
text: On lands within the game preserve established in , hunting, pursuing, poisoning, killing, or capturing by trapping, netting, or any other means, or attempting to hunt, pursue, kill, or capture any wild animals or birds for any purpose whatever upon the lands of the United States within the limits of said game preserve shall be unlawful except as hereinafter provided.section 689a of this title
notes: Amendments1948—Act , struck out penal provisions. See , Crimes and Criminal Procedure.June 25, 1948section 41 of Title 18
Effective Date of 1948 AmendmentSection 20 of act , provided that the amendment made by that act is effective .June 25, 1948Sept. 1, 1948
